마가복음 1:1.content: The beginning of the Good News of Jesus Christ, the Son of God.

마가복음 1:2.content: As it is written in the prophets, “Behold, I send my messenger before your face, who will prepare your way before you:

마가복음 1:3.content: the voice of one crying in the wilderness, ‘Make ready the way of the Lord! Make his paths straight!’ ”

마가복음 1:4.content: John came baptizing in the wilderness and preaching the baptism of repentance for forgiveness of sins.

마가복음 1:5.content: All the country of Judea and all those of Jerusalem went out to him. They were baptized by him in the Jordan river, confessing their sins.

마가복음 1:6.content: John was clothed with camel’s hair and a leather belt around his waist. He ate locusts and wild honey.

마가복음 1:7.content: He preached, saying, “After me comes he who is mightier than I, the thong of whose sandals I am not worthy to stoop down and loosen.

마가복음 1:8.content: I baptized you in water, but he will baptize you in the Holy Spirit.”

마가복음 1:9.content: In those days, Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee, and was baptized by John in the Jordan.

마가복음 1:10.content: Immediately coming up from the water, he saw the heavens parting, and the Spirit descending on him like a dove.

마가복음 1:11.content: A voice came out of the sky, “You are my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.”

마가복음 1:12.content: Immediately the Spirit drove him out into the wilderness.

마가복음 1:13.content: He was there in the wilderness forty days tempted by Satan. He was with the wild animals; and the angels were serving him.

마가복음 1:14.content: Now after John was taken into custody, Jesus came into Galilee, preaching the Good News of God’s Kingdom,

마가복음 1:15.content: and saying, “The time is fulfilled, and God’s Kingdom is at hand! Repent, and believe in the Good News.”

마가복음 1:16.content: Passing along by the sea of Galilee, he saw Simon and Andrew, the brother of Simon, casting a net into the sea, for they were fishermen.

마가복음 1:17.content: Jesus said to them, “Come after me, and I will make you into fishers for men.”

마가복음 1:18.content: Immediately they left their nets, and followed him.

마가복음 1:19.content: Going on a little further from there, he saw James the son of Zebedee, and John, his brother, who were also in the boat mending the nets.

마가복음 1:20.content: Immediately he called them, and they left their father, Zebedee, in the boat with the hired servants, and went after him.

마가복음 1:21.content: They went into Capernaum, and immediately on the Sabbath day he entered into the synagogue and taught.

마가복음 1:22.content: They were astonished at his teaching, for he taught them as having authority, and not as the scribes.

마가복음 1:23.content: Immediately there was in their synagogue a man with an unclean spirit, and he cried out,

마가복음 1:24.content: saying, “Ha! What do we have to do with you, Jesus, you Nazarene? Have you come to destroy us? I know you who you are: the Holy One of God!”

마가복음 1:25.content: Jesus rebuked him, saying, “Be quiet, and come out of him!”

마가복음 1:26.content: The unclean spirit, convulsing him and crying with a loud voice, came out of him.

마가복음 1:27.content: They were all amazed, so that they questioned among themselves, saying, “What is this? A new teaching? For with authority he commands even the unclean spirits, and they obey him!”

마가복음 1:28.content: The report of him went out immediately everywhere into all the region of Galilee and its surrounding area.

마가복음 1:29.content: Immediately, when they had come out of the synagogue, they came into the house of Simon and Andrew, with James and John.

마가복음 1:30.content: Now Simon’s wife’s mother lay sick with a fever, and immediately they told him about her.

마가복음 1:31.content: He came and took her by the hand, and raised her up. The fever left her immediately, and she served them.

마가복음 1:32.content: At evening, when the sun had set, they brought to him all who were sick, and those who were possessed by demons.

마가복음 1:33.content: All the city was gathered together at the door.

마가복음 1:34.content: He healed many who were sick with various diseases, and cast out many demons. He didn’t allow the demons to speak, because they knew him.

마가복음 1:35.content: Early in the morning, while it was still dark, he rose up and went out, and departed into a deserted place, and prayed there.

마가복음 1:36.content: Simon and those who were with him searched for him.

마가복음 1:37.content: They found him and told him, “Everyone is looking for you.”

마가복음 1:38.content: He said to them, “Let’s go elsewhere into the next towns, that I may preach there also, because I came out for this reason.”

마가복음 1:39.content: He went into their synagogues throughout all Galilee, preaching and casting out demons.

마가복음 1:40.content: A leper came to him, begging him, kneeling down to him, and saying to him, “If you want to, you can make me clean.”

마가복음 1:41.content: Being moved with compassion, he stretched out his hand, and touched him, and said to him, “I want to. Be made clean.”

마가복음 1:42.content: When he had said this, immediately the leprosy departed from him, and he was made clean.

마가복음 1:43.content: He strictly warned him, and immediately sent him out,

마가복음 1:44.content: and said to him, “See you say nothing to anybody, but go show yourself to the priest, and offer for your cleansing the things which Moses commanded, for a testimony to them.”

마가복음 1:45.content: But he went out, and began to proclaim it much, and to spread about the matter, so that Jesus could no more openly enter into a city, but was outside in desert places. People came to him from everywhere.
